IGUI_SayPlayer_NoOneAround: There is nobody around to speak to.
IGUI_SayPlayer_Dream_9: I think I know this place!
IGUI_SayPlayer_Dream_11: This is my house! I remember!
IGUI_Artifact_ColdPassage: Cold Passage and The Management of Death
IGUI_Artifact_EarlyMortuaryPractice: On Environmental Determinants of Early Mortuary Practice
IGUI_Artifact_PaleolithicSurveyGroup: Report on the Composition of the Paleolithic Survey Group
IGUI_Artifact_EffectsRadiation: Summary of Health Effects of Ionizing Radiation by ATSDR
IGUI_Artifact_GX9: MASS-GENFAC CO. Voltek GX-9 Diesel Generator
IGUI_Artifact_FinneganStaffListing: Finnegan Research Group - Clinical Operations Division - Staff Listing
IGUI_Bandits_Speech_BWOARadioCall_Female: Dave, this is Emma. I need you to answer. Over.
Dave, Eli, Martha, Luke. Please respond. Over.
Dave, Eli, Martha, Luke. What is your status? Over.
Dave, it’s me. Please respond. Over.
Dave, if you can hear this, please come back now. Over.
Dave, Bob is awake, I repeat, Bob is awake. Over.
Dave, what is your location? Over.
Dave, do you need help? Answer, please. Over.
Dave, I need you here. Over.
IGUI_Missions_1_Description:
Find and talk to Emma.
Press "T" to open chat panel.
IGUI_Missions_2_Description: Find and wear a bunker suit.
IGUI_Missions_3_Description:
Find an air vent located on the surface
and fix it using a wrench.
IGUI_Missions_4_Description: Go outside and find at least one basement with a hidden entrance in the floor.
IGUI_Missions_5_Description: Bring a zombie corpse to the laboratory and place it on the autopsy table.
IGUI_Missions_6_Name: Bring fuel truck to the Ark
IGUI_Missions_6_Description:
Fuel truck is located on Dixie Highway leading to Muldraugh Ruins.
Bring the truck home and pump the fuel to the underground tank.
IGUI_Missions_7_Name: Find and bring back the missing tool bag
IGUI_Missions_7_Description: The bag is located in the remainings of the Community Center in March Ridge Ruins.
IGUI_Missions_8_Description:
Locate Dave's group. Their last know location is south east of Rosewood Ruins.
They planned to stop at one of the houses on their way back to the Ark.
IGUI_Missions_9_Description:
Those who killed Dave and Martha, must have a shelter nearby.
Investigate basements in Rosewood Remains.
IGUI_Missions_10_Description:
You've found a car key.
It suggests a working vehicle may be nearby.
IGUI_Missions_11_Description:
Emma wants some music.
Bring a working jukebox to the Ark.
IGUI_Missions_12_Description:
Emma mentioned she plays the piano.
Find one, and bring it to the Ark.
IGUI_Missions_13_Description: Bringing more VHS tapes to the Ark will help you and Emma chill together.
IGUI_Missions_14_Description: Bring a human corpse to the laboratory and place it on the autopsy table.
IGUI_Missions_50_Description:
Emma left the Ark. Find her!
You remember her mentioning something about the warehouses near Muldraugh.
IGUI_Missions_51_Description: You found Emma. Now, bring her to the Ark safely.
IGUI_Missions_100_Name: Go to church in Fallas Lake
IGUI_Missions_100_Description: The voice in your dream points you to Fallas Lake church.
IGUI_Missions_101_Name: Investigate the church in Ekron Ruins
IGUI_Missions_101_Description: According to the priest's note in Fallas Lake, church in Ekron hides some secrets.
IGUI_Missions_102_Description: Comfrey plays some role in all of this. Find it. Plant it
IGUI_Missions_103_Description: Grow and harvest a healthy comfrey plant.
IGUI_Missions_110_Description: The voice in your dream points you now to the secret lab near Rosewood Ruins.
IGUI_Missions_111_Description:
One of the research team's home addresses points to a location that can be reached.
Conduct thorough investigation of the house.
IGUI_Missions_112_Description: You found some syringes with an unknown substance. Bring them back to Emma.
IGUI_Missions_113_Name: Leave the syringe in the lab
IGUI_Missions_113_Description: Place the syringe with the unknown substance somewhere in the lab.
IGUI_Missions_120_Description: Conduct a thorough search of C-level executives office suite in of Finnegan's HQ in Louisville Ruins.
